name: James Parker Golf Coaching
about: James Parker Golf Coaching is a premium golf training studio located in Allen, Texas. As the Director of Instruction at Ethos Golf Performance, James Parker offers personalized coaching to a diverse clientele, including busy executives, professionals, and golfers from 17 countries. The studio utilizes advanced technology such as TrackMan, V1 Video, Pressure Mats, and SportsboxAI for all in-person and remote lessons, providing a data-driven approach to swing improvement. With over 28 years of experience and more than 30,000 lessons completed, the focus is on building efficient, repeatable golf swings through measurable, straightforward instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses premium TrackMan and V1 Video technology for precise swing analysis
Offers both in-person and remote coaching options for global reach
Data-driven approach with 30K+ lessons and 28+ years of experience
Personalized instruction focused on efficient, long-term swing improvements

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB not confirmed

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor used for all lessons

faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but it's standard practice to bring your own clubs for lessons. Club rentals may be available but are not mentioned.

faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned on the website. BYOB policy is not confirmed.

faq.answer: The website doesn't provide information on simulator gameplay duration or 18-hole times.
